content: In this monorepo, the Bun runtime service is under server/src. Docker builds should copy server/package.json and server/src (or COPY server/ with WORKDIR /app/server), not root src/.
Server Dockerfile in this repo should use WORKDIR /app/server, copy from server/package.json and server/src, and expose PORT 3001 to match server default deployment.

name: duplicate-join-guard
description: For WebSocket rooms, guard join handlers against duplicate join messages from the same socket (e.g. React Strict Mode remount behavior) and return current room-state instead of creating duplicate players.

content: For Railway Docker deploys, Bun servers should bind HOST=0.0.0.0 explicitly and read PORT from process.env.PORT; avoid hardcoding ENV PORT in Dockerfile so platform-assigned ports work.
When deploying WebWare server to Railway via Docker, align Docker EXPOSE with Railway runtime port (8080) to avoid edge fallback 502 from container-port mismatch.
